message:
fix(core): recover from poisoned mutex in fallocate log-contract tests

Use unwrap_or_else(|p| p.into_inner()) instead of expect() when
acquiring the fallocate log-contract serialisation lock.  This
prevents a panic in one test from cascade-failing all subsequent
tests that share the lock.

bd-2zgc

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
